About

Hi, I'm Aishi

A little about me

I'm an artist, writer, and community organizer who loves making things and helping people in equal measure. Whether I'm leading programs through volunteering, painting, or performing at an open mic, I'm happiest creating something or showing up for someone. Looking ahead, I'm drawn to psychology and hope to become a Licensed Mental Health Counselor, which is my way to keep helping people, just more directly. Until then, I'll keep making art, writing, and finding small ways to make my community better.
